title: Entry-Level Radiologist at RML Hospital Holdings Services

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Radiologist at RML Hospital Holdings Services
jsonLd.description:
RML Hospital Holdings Services has an exciting opening for a Radiologist at our Delhi office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About RML Hospital Holdings Services:
RML Hospital Holdings Services is a leading organization in the Hybrid sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Respond to medical emergencies and provide immediate care
• Maintain accurate clinical documentation in electronic health records
• Collaborate with pharmaceutical representatives and medical suppliers
• Educate patients and families on health management and disease prevention
• Monitor patient progress and adjust treatment plans accordingly
• Maintain sterile environments and follow infection control protocols
• Provide high-quality patient care and maintain patient records

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
• 3-6 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in HIPAA Compliance
• Proficiency in Medical Ethics
• Proficiency in CPT Codes
• Proficiency in Clinical Research
• Proficiency in Diagnostic Skills
• Proficiency in Surgical Procedures
• Proficiency in ICD-10
• Proficiency in NABH Standards

Work Mode: Hybrid - Flexible work-from-home and office

What We Offer:
• Mobile and internet reimbursement
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Referral bonus program
• Annual performance appraisal
• Salary Range: 7 LPA - 15 LPA per annum

Location: Delhi, Delhi, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with RML Hospital Holdings Services!

educationRequirements.credentialCategory: B.Ed / M.Ed from a recognized institution
